name: BookStack
what: Simple, structured wiki/documentation platform organized into shelves, books, chapters, and pages.
solves: Internal SOPs, protocols, service runbooks, and operator documentation with a friendly non-technical UI.
users: Operations, support, and documentation teams who need an opinionated but easy knowledge base.
fit: Strong fit for internal Hylono protocols, device SOPs, and service documentation. Better fit than Outline for structured internal operations docs.
runtime: PHP/Laravel application with relational database, file uploads, and optional auth integrations.
components: Web app, DB, file storage, search, optional LDAP/OIDC/SAML, and editor/media handling.
deploy: Simple Docker or standard web-stack deployments are common and operationally light.
deps: Database, storage, reverse proxy/TLS, mail, and auth integration if needed.
auth: Local auth plus SAML/OIDC/LDAP options depending on setup.
apis: REST API, content import/export, and auth integrations.
security: Docs may contain sensitive internal procedures. Restrict access and review file upload/storage controls.
setup_path: Deploy via Docker or official install scripts; make it internal-only and connect to SSO when identity is ready.
env: APP_URL, DB settings, app key, mail, storage, and auth provider settings.
persistence: Back up DB and uploads; content export can support disaster recovery.
operations: Version upgrades and content governance are straightforward.
failure_points: Using it for public docs when Docusaurus is better, or for complex collaborative docs where Outline might be preferred.
integration: Great internal documentation hub for operational protocols referenced by support, sales, rentals, and service teams.
verify: Confirm whether Hylono wants structured internal wiki more than collaborative team-doc editing.
gdpr: Mostly internal content; personal data risk depends on what users write into pages.
overlap: Preferred over Outline for structured internal SOPs; separate from Docusaurus public docs.
codex_read_first: Read internal docs requirements and the overlap map with Outline/Docusaurus.
codex_best_path: Use BookStack as the internal protocol and runbook wiki, behind SSO when available.
codex_never_assume: Never conflate internal SOP docs with public product/docs site needs.
